title: hieracium koehleri
intro: Hieracium koehleri, also known as Hawk's beard or Koeher's hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and reducing pain. The health benefits of Hieracium koehleri include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic, making it useful for treating urinary issues and promoting fluid balance in the body. Herbal preparations of Hieracium koehleri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
